description: FFmpeg audio muxing -- audio track integration (WAV and MP3 input), synchronization strategy, single-pass vs two-pass encoding decision (mux audio in the same FFmpeg invocation as video frames, or in a separate remux pass). Covers C-07 (audio synchronization) at the encoding level.
notes: Tier 2 engine core. Two-pass remux approach: OBJ-013 produces video-only MP4, this module muxes audio via separate FFmpeg invocation with -c:v copy. Adds ffprobe-static as a dependency. Supports WAV (re-encoded to AAC) and MP3 (stream-copied when volume=1.0). Four duration strategies: match_shortest, match_audio (default), match_video, error.
